info.title: SDKWork Catalog App API
info.description: App/client contract for sdkwork-catalog capability (split from retired sdkwork-commerce monolith).
info.x-sdkwork-audience: App, desktop, mobile, H5, and user-facing clients.

AuthToken.description: SDKWork auth token carried as Authorization: Bearer <auth_token>.

CommerceOperationCommand.description: Operation-specific command payload defined by the owning commerce Rust module.

status.description: Target status for the after-sales request lifecycle transition.
